colors.usage: Interactive elements, links, highlights, focus states

colors.usage: Secondary text, placeholders, inactive navigation items, captions

typography.usage: General body text, descriptions, input values

spacing.usage: Tight gaps between closely related elements, icon-to-label within nav items

spacing.usage: Card internal padding, navigation bar horizontal padding

spacing.name: spacing-lg
spacing.usage: Spacing between sections and grouped components

spacing.name: spacing-xl
spacing.usage: Page section top and bottom margins
